_comment: Poseidon2 parity test vectors for the Solva proof cycle.
Instance: t=3, rate=2, capacity=1, R_F=8, R_P=56, S-box x^5.
Calling convention: Poseidon2::hash([left, right], 2) -- two field elements,
Expected values produced by the Noir circuit (poseidon2_parity_print test)
using poseidon crate v0.2.6 against Noir 1.0.0-beta.9. The circuit is the
authoritative source. All other layers must match these values exactly.
NOTE ON PROVER INPUT COUNT: services/prover/src/tree.rs currently passes
FOUR inputs to poseidon2() [left.hash, right.hash, left.sum, right.sum].
The Noir circuit passes TWO. hash_pair() must be fixed before the prover
parity tests can pass. See circuits/lib/POSEIDON2_PARAMS.md.

vectors.description: Left=0, right=1 -- must differ from v1 (argument-order sensitivity).
hash_leaf(SHA-256('customer-0001') mod p, 1000000). Exercises the leaf path.
